topic: ChatGPT prompting strategies and real-world use cases

entries.a: A curated collection of prompt examples for AI chat models, originally created for ChatGPT.

entries.q: What AI models are supported by prompts.chat?
entries.a: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and more.

entries.q: How can I contribute to prompts.chat?
entries.a: You can add prompts at prompts.chat/prompts/new, and they will sync automatically.

entries.q: What is the Interactive Book of Prompting?
entries.a: A free, interactive guide with 25+ chapters covering prompt engineering, from basics to advanced techniques.
An interactive, game-based adventure to teach children (ages 8-14) how to communicate with AI through fun puzzles and stories.

entries.q: Can I self-host my own private prompt library?
entries.a: Yes, you can deploy your own private prompt library with custom branding, themes, and authentication using prompts.chat.

entries.q: What are some available integrations for prompts.chat?
entries.a: CLI, Claude Code Plugin, and MCP Server are some available integrations for prompts.chat.

entries.q: How can I use prompts.chat as an MCP server?
entries.a: You can use prompts.chat as an MCP server in your AI tools by configuring the MCP server settings, either remotely or locally.
